notes: Scaffold for lawyer.id.vn (Professional Identity — EN only, foreign clients). International-business aesthetic, confident and polished. Icons: transparent PNG, antique gold, strong/sturdy per F-010 rule from vothienhien.com. Name: 'Vo Thien Hien' (never 'Henry Vo') per F-003. Builder agent: edit prompts to match final design.

images.name: Homepage Hero — HCMC Skyline from Office
images.prompt: Editorial photograph from a high-floor modern law-firm office in Ho Chi Minh City: panoramic view of the HCMC business district skyline at golden hour through floor-to-ceiling windows, reflection of a softly-lit walnut desk and antique gold lamp in the foreground glass. Sophisticated, international, confident. No people, no text, no signage. Composition leaves upper-left negative space for overlaid headline.

images.name: About Page Hero — Attorney Portrait (ref required)
images.prompt: Transform the reference portrait into a polished international-business attorney headshot: subject in a charcoal suit, open-collar white shirt, confident composed expression, soft studio lighting, neutral warm backdrop with slight bokeh of law-library shelving behind. International law-firm partner aesthetic — think Clifford Chance or Baker McKenzie profile photography. Preserve the subject's facial likeness faithfully. No text overlays.

images.name: International Clients Section Hero
images.prompt: Editorial photograph: a modern international-law-firm conference room, long walnut table with subtle gold accents, empty chairs, floor-to-ceiling windows overlooking HCMC by day, soft natural light. Passport-style stacked folders on the table as a subtle visual motif (no readable text). Sophisticated, welcoming to foreign clients.

images.name: OG Card — Default
images.prompt: Open-graph social card background: deep charcoal field with a single antique-gold scales silhouette on the left third, thin gold border frame, empty right region for overlaid title. Premium international law-firm polish. Readable at 1200x630. No text.

images.name: Icon — Scales of Justice
images.prompt: Emblematic mark of the scales of justice. Bold, weighty, sturdy proportions (strong and sturdy). Heavy central beam, broad balanced pans, solid base. Solid antique gold, flat vector aesthetic. NO letters, NO text. NO background — fully transparent PNG with alpha channel. Centered, generous margins.

images.name: Icon — Gavel
images.prompt: Emblematic mark: a single gavel on its sound block. Chunky head, solid handle, weighty. Solid antique gold, flat vector minimal. NO letters, NO text. Fully transparent PNG with alpha channel.

images.name: Icon — World Globe with Meridians
images.prompt: Emblematic mark: a classical world globe with meridians and a stand, symbolizing international practice. Strong geometric silhouette, sturdy. Solid antique gold, flat vector. NO letters, NO text, NO country names. Fully transparent PNG with alpha channel.

images.name: Icon — Contract and Pen
images.prompt: Emblematic mark: a folded contract document with a classical fountain pen resting across it. Bold silhouette, sturdy. Solid antique gold, flat vector. NO letters, NO text, NO readable content on document. Fully transparent PNG with alpha channel.

images.name: Icon — Handshake (Client Partnership)
images.prompt: Emblematic mark: two hands in a firm handshake silhouette, symbolizing attorney-client partnership. Bold, confident, sturdy. Solid antique gold, flat vector. NO letters, NO text. Fully transparent PNG with alpha channel.

images.name: Favicon — Mini Scales
images.prompt: Simplified scales-of-justice silhouette for a favicon. Extremely legible at 16×16. Solid antique gold on fully transparent PNG with alpha channel. Minimal detail, strong geometric shapes. NO letters, NO text.

images.name: Subtle Office Section Background
images.prompt: Extremely subtle dark-walnut wood grain texture, very low contrast, warm tone, for use as a soft section background behind lighter content cards. Uniform, no dominant features, no text, no images.

images.name: Practice Hero — Civil Litigation
images.prompt: Editorial photograph of a Vietnamese courtroom interior: judge's bench in dark walnut, the national emblem of Vietnam in subdued gold above the bench, tall arched windows letting in late-afternoon golden light, polished marble floor, empty wooden defense table in foreground. No people. Composition leaves left negative space for overlaid headline. Sophisticated, institutional, deep navy and warm gold palette.

images.name: Practice Hero — Land & Property
images.prompt: Aerial drone photograph of a modern Ho Chi Minh City residential development at golden hour: clusters of contemporary apartment towers along the Saigon River, palm-lined boulevards, lush greenery between buildings, high-end finish. Soft golden light, light haze on horizon. No watermarks, no readable signage. Negative space upper third for text overlay.

images.name: Practice Hero — Family Law & Divorce
images.prompt: Soft warm photograph: two pairs of clasped hands resting on an open legal document on a walnut desk, antique gold pen alongside, a single delicate lily in soft focus background. Cinematic lighting, intimate but professional, suggesting compassionate counsel for sensitive family matters. Muted neutral palette with warm gold accents. No faces visible.

images.name: Practice Hero — Corporate & Commercial
images.prompt: Architectural photograph of a modern glass corporate office building exterior in District 1, Ho Chi Minh City: sleek curtain wall, deep blue glass with reflections of clouds, a small antique-gold sun catching the upper floors. Clean composition, low angle, no people, no readable signage. International business district atmosphere.

images.name: Practice Hero — Labor & Employment
images.prompt: Editorial photograph of a cross-cultural business handshake across a modern conference table: one Vietnamese professional in dark suit, one Western professional in lighter suit, captured at moment of agreement. Soft natural light from floor-to-ceiling windows behind, panoramic city beyond. No faces visible — focus on hands and posture. Warm professional tones, deep navy + warm gold.

images.name: Practice Hero — Criminal Defense
images.prompt: Dramatic exterior of a Vietnamese courthouse at twilight: classical pillared façade with the national emblem in subdued gold, deep blue overcast sky, low-angle composition emphasizing institutional authority. Soft warm courtyard lighting beginning to glow. No people, no readable signage. Cinematic, deep navy + low-key gold accents.

images.name: Practice Hero — International Arbitration
images.prompt: Editorial photograph of an international arbitration hearing room: long polished walnut table extending into the frame with five tall leather chairs on each side, individual microphones at each seat, water carafes and glasses, neat stacks of bound briefs in front of each seat. Floor-to-ceiling windows behind reveal a hazy international skyline. No people. Neutral institutional palette, deep navy + warm gold accents.

images.name: Practice Hero — Overview / Hub
images.prompt: Composite editorial still life: leather-bound legal volumes stacked beside a fanned arrangement of unmarked legal documents, an antique-gold scales-of-justice paperweight at center, a classical fountain pen resting alongside. Polished walnut desk, soft window light from upper left. Sophisticated, professional, emblematic of the legal profession. No readable text on documents. Deep navy backdrop with warm gold accents.

images.name: Infographic — Vietnam Court System Hierarchy
images.prompt: Clean professional infographic on dark navy background: hierarchical flow diagram of the Vietnam court system. Top: a single rounded rectangle reading "SUPREME PEOPLE'S COURT" in warm gold. Below it: three rounded rectangles labeled "HIGH PEOPLE'S COURTS — Hanoi, Da Nang, Ho Chi Minh City". Below those: "PROVINCIAL PEOPLE'S COURTS" spanning width. Bottom: "DISTRICT PEOPLE'S COURTS". Connected by thin teal lines with arrowheads. Sans-serif typography, English labels, generous whitespace. Minimalist flat design.

images.name: Infographic — Dispute Resolution Decision Tree
images.prompt: Clean professional decision-tree infographic on dark navy background: starting node "DISPUTE ARISES" branches to four paths labeled in warm gold: NEGOTIATION, MEDIATION, ARBITRATION (subdivided into VIAC, SIAC, ICC), LITIGATION (subdivided into District Court, Provincial Court). Thin teal connection lines, sans-serif English labels, generous whitespace. Minimalist flat design.

images.name: Section Divider — Gold Lines on Navy
images.prompt: Abstract minimal section divider: a single horizontal field of deep navy with three thin parallel antique-gold lines of varying length crossing horizontally, slight shimmer, evoking classical legal heraldry. Almost empty composition with negative space — suitable as a 1920×400 background between content sections. No text, no figures.

images.name: Section Divider — Topographic Lines
images.prompt: Abstract minimal background pattern: subtle topographic-style contour lines in deep blue against a slightly darker navy field, low contrast, suggesting cartography and global reach. Suitable as a sectional background overlay at 5-10% opacity. No text, no figures, no legend.

images.name: Decorative Pattern — Globe Meridians
images.prompt: Decorative pattern: classical globe meridian lines in deep navy and faint teal on a subtle off-white field, overlapping ovals suggesting spheres in different orientations. Evokes a 19th-century world atlas. Tileable, suitable as section background overlay. No text, no continents drawn.

images.name: Case Visual — Cross-Border Connections
images.prompt: Stylized illustration of a world map silhouette in deep navy: thin antique-gold connection arcs radiating from a single bright teal node positioned at Vietnam to multiple international cities (New York, London, Tokyo, Sydney, Singapore, Seoul, Frankfurt). Editorial, minimalist, generous negative space. Suitable for case-study or international-reach feature blocks.

images.name: Case Visual — Document Signing Close-up
images.prompt: Cinematic close-up photograph: two professional hands across a polished walnut desk, one holding a classical fountain pen poised over the signature line of a formal legal document, the other resting flat. Soft warm lighting from upper right, shallow depth of field, no readable text on document, no logos. Suggests a moment of closure, agreement reached.

images.name: Article Hero — For Foreign Investors
images.prompt: Editorial photograph: an international business professional (back to camera) in a charcoal suit reviewing a stack of legal documents at a tall window of a modern Ho Chi Minh City office tower at sunset, the city skyline glowing warmly beyond. No faces visible, no readable text on documents. Sophisticated international-business atmosphere.

images.name: Article Hero — For Expats
images.prompt: Warm editorial photograph: a Western expat in casual professional attire (cream linen shirt, no jacket) walking along a leafy boulevard in District 1 Ho Chi Minh City at midday, dappled light through tamarind trees, French-colonial architecture in the background. Soft motion blur on the subject suggesting movement and life. No faces visible (back or three-quarter view). Lifestyle editorial.

images.name: About Hero — Cinematic Office Portrait of Mr Hiển
images.prompt: Editorial photograph of the SAME lawyer as the reference image (preserve his face exactly: clean short haircut, rectangular wire-frame glasses, calm composed smile, slight stubble). Three-quarter angle. He stands in a high-floor modern law office in Ho Chi Minh City overlooking the panoramic city skyline at golden hour through floor-to-ceiling windows. Wearing a charcoal pinstripe suit (matching reference) with a white open-collar shirt. Looking thoughtfully outward toward the city. Soft natural golden-hour light from the window, subtle warm reflections from an antique gold desk lamp on the right edge. Cinematic, sophisticated, international-business atmosphere. Composition leaves the upper-left third as negative space for overlaid headline. No readable text on documents, no signage.

images.name: About — Mr Hiển at Desk Reviewing Documents
images.prompt: Editorial photograph of the SAME lawyer as the reference image (preserve face, glasses, hair, charcoal pinstripe suit). Seated at a polished walnut desk in a modern law office, three-quarter angle from above-right, both hands resting on an open formal legal document (no readable text). An antique gold fountain pen rests beside the document. Floor-to-ceiling windows with HCMC skyline in soft-focus background. Warm natural light from the window. Calm focused expression. Sophisticated, intellectual, premium editorial.

images.name: About — Mr Hiển at Law Library Bookshelf
images.prompt: Editorial photograph of the SAME lawyer as the reference image (preserve face exactly). Standing in a private law library, half-body shot from a slight low angle. He has just pulled a leather-bound legal volume from a tall walnut bookshelf and holds it in one hand, looking down at a page. Wearing the charcoal pinstripe suit from the reference, white shirt, no tie. Warm tungsten ceiling light combined with soft daylight from a side window. Background shelves filled with legal volumes, soft-focus. Contemplative, scholarly atmosphere.

images.name: About — Mr Hiển in Client Consultation
images.prompt: Editorial photograph of the SAME lawyer as the reference image (preserve face, glasses, hair). Seated at a modern conference table in profile, leaning slightly forward with hands gestured open as if explaining a point. Wearing the charcoal pinstripe suit. A second person (anonymous, only their hands and shoulder visible) sits across, listening. Open legal documents on the table between them, no readable text. Soft window light from the left. Warm professional atmosphere. International-law-firm conference room with floor-to-ceiling windows in soft-focus background.

images.name: About — Mr Hiển Walking in District 1
images.prompt: Editorial lifestyle photograph of the SAME lawyer as the reference image (preserve face, glasses, hair). Walking along a leafy tamarind-tree-lined boulevard in District 1, Ho Chi Minh City at midday, three-quarter view. French-colonial architecture in soft-focus background. Wearing the charcoal pinstripe suit (jacket open, shirt open-collar, no tie), carrying a slim leather portfolio. Calm purposeful stride. Soft dappled light through the trees. Subtle motion blur on the background suggests movement. Warm lifestyle editorial tone.

images.name: About — Mr Hiển Speaking at Conference
images.prompt: Editorial photograph of the SAME lawyer as the reference image (preserve face, glasses, hair). Standing at a clean modern wooden lectern in a corporate-conference setting, three-quarter angle from below-right, mid-speech with one hand mid-gesture. Wearing the charcoal pinstripe suit, white shirt, no tie. Soft warm stage light from above-left, slight haze. Background out-of-focus suggests an audience and a discreet conference banner (no readable text). Confident composed expression. Professional thought-leadership atmosphere.
